# Meenakshi Girish

> Meenakshi Girish is a freelance content writer, content strategist, author and speaker with 7+ years of professional writing experience. She is the author of *The Freelancer's Mindset* and mentors writers and freelancers. Based in India, working with brands globally.

Meenakshi writes websites, blogs, SEO content, newsletters and ghostwritten thought leadership for brands across healthcare, SaaS, B2B, e-commerce and more. She also speaks at colleges and events on freelancing, content strategy and personal branding, and offers 1-on-1 mentoring.
